edits.description: JavaCalculator.computeTotal() widens its return type from int to long. Only the .java file is touched - OrderService.kt (one hop) and MainActivity.kt (two hops) both call it transitively without any signature declared in their own source, so this is D2's 'a Java signature change forces Kotlin recompile' case, and the bound is tight enough to fail if either Kotlin dependent is left stale.

assertions.name: behavioral_marker
assertions.detail: marker 'QB_JAVA_SIG_MARKER_V2' found in recompiled class bytes

edits.description: KotlinFormatter.formatLabel() gains a required suffix parameter. Java has no default-parameter sugar, so its one caller, JavaPresenter.java, must be edited in the same changeset to pass the new argument - D2's 'a Kotlin change forces Java recompile' case.

edits.description: Replace the bundled arm64-v8a libnativestub.so with a rebuilt binary. ChangeClassifier has no packaging story for a changed native library - it's an UNSUPPORTED_FILE_CHANGED fallback (see ChangeClassifierTest's 'native library under jniLibs falls back honestly'), so this must route to a full Gradle rebaseline rather than be served as a quick build (D7's '.so change routes to REBASELINE').

assertions.name: op_success
assertions.detail: fallback recorded: no daemon op invoked (full Gradle build expected)

Change main_title's android:textSize attribute in activity_main.xml (text_size_medium -> text_size_large). No code changes — aapt2 relink only, cached dex reused.

Add a new string resource (new_feature_label) and reference it from MainActivity via R.string.new_feature_label. This is the R-id-regeneration case: aapt2 must assign the new resource an ID (not just relink an existing one) before the code that references it can compile, so the route is mixed (relink AND compile), not resources-only.
